_label_note: KR Stage A strict tier reconciled to deterministic strict-mode engine after Codex/GPT-assisted mismatch review; broader model-derived labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery. Narrow fixes covered KR resident-number shorthand/KR-BRN anchors, checksum-valid RRN/business-registration positives, negated no-executed-term-sheet wording, and public/stale percentage prose. The generated must-not label for “Ms. Hana Park” was rejected because the text is an actual named-person reference.

_agent_review.notes: Reconciled KR Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, KR resident/business number checksum issues, negated term-sheet bait, public/stale percentage bait, and the bad role-only must-not label for an actual named person; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.

_agent_review_history.notes: Reconciled KR Stage A strict labels to current deterministic strict-mode findings after manual review of raw auto-label mismatches, KR resident/business number checksum issues, negated term-sheet bait, public/stale percentage bait, and the bad role-only must-not label for an actual named person; retained non-deterministic statutory/coverage targets in ideal_must_detect.
